moves.name: Arsene's data is in parentheses. Arsene's hitboxes are colored orange on the standard hitbox images.
moves.active_frames: Joker's Rebellion Gauge has a 100 Unit Cap, in which Arsene will appear for 1800 Frames (30 seconds). Joker gains 0.00925 Units per frame, or 0.555 a second. Arsene, as a result, is guaranteed to appear after 3 minutes. If Joker takes damage, he will gain units equivalent to 1.3x the damage. Thus, taking exactly 76.92% will make Arsene appear guaranteed.
moves.total_frames: If Joker is hit while Arsene is active, the timer will drop by 16*Damage in Frames (this was 12*Damage Pre-7.0.0). As a result, taking 112.5% in total will remove Arsene (was 150% pre-7.0.0). The timer continues ticking in hitlag as well. For more information on Rebellion Gauge mechanics, check

moves.name: Gun
moves.on_shield: Earliest you can input another shot, dash, or jump is frame 26. Earliest you can input spiral or shoot below is frame 14. Hitstun decreases with range, up to no hitstun at all when far.

moves.name: Gun, Forward
moves.on_shield: Invulnerable on frame 4-13. Is affected by and contributes to dodge staling. Buffering gun maneuvers delays them by 4 frames.

moves.name: Gun, Back
moves.on_shield: Invulnerable on frame 5-14. Is affected by and contributes to dodge staling. Buffering gun maneuvers delays them by 4 frames.

moves.name: Gun, Jump
moves.on_shield: Invulnerable on frame 1-6. Is *not* affected by nor contributes to dodge staling. Buffering gun maneuvers delays them by 4 frames.

moves.name: Gun, Up
moves.on_shield: Can be extended for more shots. Buffering gun maneuvers delays them by 4 frames.

moves.name: Gun, Down
moves.on_shield: Can be extended for more shots. Buffering gun maneuvers delays them by 4 frames.

moves.name: Gun (Arsene)
moves.on_shield: Earliest you can input another shot, dash, or jump is frame 34. Earliest you can input spiral or shoot below is frame 15. Buffering gun maneuvers delays them by 4 frames.

moves.name: Gun (Arsene), Forward
moves.on_shield: Invulnerable on frame 4-13. Is affected by and contributes to dodge staling. Buffering gun maneuvers delays them by 4 frames.

moves.name: Gun (Arsene), Back
moves.on_shield: Invulnerable on frame 5-14. Is affected by and contributes to dodge staling. Buffering gun maneuvers delays them by 4 frames.

moves.name: Gun (Arsene), Jump
moves.on_shield: Invulnerable on frame 1-6. Is *not* affected by or contributes to dodge staling. Added shots in Arsene version deal just 1.0 damage. Buffering gun maneuvers delays them by 4 frames.

moves.name: Gun (Arsene), Up
moves.on_shield: Can be extended for more shots. Buffering gun maneuvers delays them by 4 frames.

moves.name: Gun (Arsene), Down
moves.startup: Gun Special, Shoot Below (From Air Only)
moves.on_shield: Can be extended for more shots. Added shots in Arsene version deal just 0.8. Buffering gun maneuvers delays them by 4 frames.

moves.name: Gun Special, Shoot Below (From Air Only)
Side B (Eiha)
moves.landing_lag: Erupts a frame after contact, but won't erupt on shields. Eiha has a Rehit Rate of 45, dealing 1% every 361 frames (additional damage in 1v1).

moves.name: Side B, Arsene (Eigaon)
moves.landing_lag: Eruption hits in parenthesis, but won't erupt on shields. Eigaon's Curse has a Rehit Rate of 40, and deals 1.5% each time. Lasts 321 Frames.

moves.name: Up B (Grappling Hook)
moves.landing_lag: Tethers on frame 12. Second total frames is for the air. Does not induce special fall

moves.name: Air, Grappling Attack
moves.landing_lag: The air version cannot grab, instead hitting the target for 5.0 damage.

moves.name: Down B (Rebel's Guard)
moves.landing_lag: Total frames is for minimum usage. 33 endlag for extended usage. Begins blocking on frame 3. Can only counterattack after a block. When hit during Rebel's Guard, Joker will gain Rebellion Gauge units equal to Damage*6.7368*1.3*0.4. Taking 28.6% will fill the meter completely. He will also take 0.4* the damage. This IS affected by the 1v1 Multiplier. Has an inherent 1.1x Hitstun Multiplier, and 1.5x Hitlag Multiplier.

moves.name: Down B, Arsene (Tetrakarn/Makarakarn)
moves.landing_lag: Invulnerable on frame 3. Counters/reflects on frame 4-31. 1.6* Damage Multiplier with a minimum of 12% and maximum of 50%.

moves.name: Arsene, Tetrakarn Counterattack
moves.landing_lag: Invulnerable on frame 1-8 in addition to counter freeze frames
